title: Towards Robust Content Watermarking Against Removal and Forgery Attacks
summary: Generated contents have raised serious concerns about copyright protection, image provenance, and credit attribution. A potential solution for these problems is watermarking. Recently, content watermarking for text-to-image diffusion models has been studied extensively for its effective detection utility and robustness. However, these watermarking techniques are vulnerable to potential adversarial attacks, such as removal attacks and forgery attacks. In this paper, we build a novel watermarking paradigm called Instance-Specific watermarking with Two-Sided detection (ISTS) to resist removal and forgery attacks. Specifically, we introduce a strategy that dynamically controls the injection time and watermarking patterns based on the semantics of users' prompts. Furthermore, we propose a new two-sided detection approach to enhance robustness in watermark detection. Experiments have demonstrated the superiority of our watermarking against removal and forgery attacks.

AI.tldr: 针对文本到图像扩散模型，提出了一种名为实例特定双边水印（ISTS）的新水印方案，通过动态控制水印注入时间和模式来抵抗去除攻击和伪造攻击。
AI.motivation: 生成内容引发版权保护、图像来源和署名归因的严重担忧，现有水印技术容易受到去除攻击和伪造攻击的威胁。
AI.method: 提出ISTS水印方案，包含：1）基于用户提示语义动态控制水印注入时间和模式；2）新的双边检测方法增强水印检测鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明该水印方案在抵抗去除攻击和伪造攻击方面具有优越性。
AI.conclusion: ISTS水印范式能有效解决扩散模型水印面临的对抗性攻击问题，为AI生成图像的版权保护提供了新的技术途径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about watermarking for text-to-image diffusion models (image copyright protection), which is completely different from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion. While both use diffusion models, the application domain is entirely different - image generation vs. motion generation. The paper doesn't address any of the three pain points (2D-to-3D geometric mapping, VLM quality assessment, or video-to-motion error accumulation) and uses completely different methods (watermarking detection vs. pose estimation/skeleton extraction).

title: CAFP: A Post-Processing Framework for Group Fairness via Counterfactual Model Averaging
summary: Ensuring fairness in machine learning predictions is a critical challenge, especially when models are deployed in sensitive domains such as credit scoring, healthcare, and criminal justice. While many fairness interventions rely on data preprocessing or algorithmic constraints during training, these approaches often require full control over the model architecture and access to protected attribute information, which may not be feasible in real-world systems. In this paper, we propose Counterfactual Averaging for Fair Predictions (CAFP), a model-agnostic post-processing method that mitigates unfair influence from protected attributes without retraining or modifying the original classifier. CAFP operates by generating counterfactual versions of each input in which the sensitive attribute is flipped, and then averaging the model's predictions across factual and counterfactual instances. We provide a theoretical analysis of CAFP, showing that it eliminates direct dependence on the protected attribute, reduces mutual information between predictions and sensitive attributes, and provably bounds the distortion introduced relative to the original model. Under mild assumptions, we further show that CAFP achieves perfect demographic parity and reduces the equalized odds gap by at least half the average counterfactual bias.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为CAFP的模型无关后处理方法，通过对原始输入和反事实输入的预测进行平均来减轻敏感属性的不公平影响，无需重新训练或修改原始分类器，理论上可实现人口统计均等并减少均等几率差距。
AI.motivation: 确保机器学习预测的公平性是一个关键挑战，特别是在信用评分、医疗保健和刑事司法等敏感领域。现有的公平性干预方法通常依赖于数据预处理或训练期间的算法约束，这些方法需要完全控制模型架构和访问受保护属性信息，而在现实世界的系统中这些条件往往不可行。
AI.method: CAFP通过生成每个输入的反事实版本（翻转敏感属性），然后对事实和反事实实例的预测进行平均来运作。这是一种模型无关的后处理方法，不需要重新训练或修改原始分类器。
AI.result: 理论分析表明，CAFP能够消除对受保护属性的直接依赖，降低预测与敏感属性之间的互信息，并可证明地限制相对于原始模型的扭曲。在温和假设下，CAFP实现完美的人口统计均等，并将均等几率差距减少至少50%的平均反事实偏差。
AI.conclusion:
CAFP作为一个模型无关的后处理方法，能够消除对受保护属性的直接依赖，降低预测与敏感属性之间的互信息，并在温和假设下实现完美的人口统计均等和至少减少50%的均等几率差距。

这种方法的优势在于它不需要修改原始分类器，也不需要访问受保护属性信息，使得它特别适合部署在无法控制模型架构或敏感信息的实际系统中。

relevance_reason: This paper is about machine learning fairness and bias mitigation in classification tasks (credit scoring, healthcare, criminal justice). The application domain has NO connection to Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, video generation, 3D motion generation, pose estimation, or skeleton extraction. Even though both involve "models", the purposes are completely different - this paper addresses fairness in ML predictions, not visual/motion content generation or processing. The methods (counterfactual averaging for fairness) are entirely unrelated to any of the pain points mentioned in the research profile.

title: VDPP: Video Depth Post-Processing for Speed and Scalability
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures. Accepted to CVPR 2024 Workshop. Project page: https://github.com/injun-baek/VDPP
summary: Video depth estimation is essential for providing 3D scene structure in applications ranging from autonomous driving to mixed reality. Current end-to-end video depth models have established state-of-the-art performance. Although current end-to-end (E2E) models have achieved state-of-the-art performance, they function as tightly coupled systems that suffer from a significant adaptation lag whenever superior single-image depth estimators are released. To mitigate this issue, post-processing methods such as NVDS offer a modular plug-and-play alternative to incorporate any evolving image depth model without retraining. However, existing post-processing methods still struggle to match the efficiency and practicality of E2E systems due to limited speed, accuracy, and RGB reliance. In this work, we revitalize the role of post-processing by proposing VDPP (Video Depth Post-Processing), a framework that improves the speed and accuracy of post-processing methods for video depth estimation. By shifting the paradigm from computationally expensive scene reconstruction to targeted geometric refinement, VDPP operates purely on geometric refinements in low-resolution space. This design achieves exceptional speed (>43.5 FPS on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano) while matching the temporal coherence of E2E systems, with dense residual learning driving geometric representations rather than full reconstructions. Furthermore, our VDPP's RGB-free architecture ensures true scalability, enabling immediate integration with any evolving image depth model. Our results demonstrate that VDPP provides a superior balance of speed, accuracy, and memory efficiency, making it the most practical solution for real-time edge deployment. Our project page is at https://github.com/injun-baek/VDPP

AI.tldr: VDPP是一种视频深度后处理框架，通过在低分辨率空间中进行纯几何精炼而非计算密集型的场景重建，实现了超过43.5 FPS的实时推理速度，同时保持与端到端系统相当的时间一致性。其RGB无关架构确保可立即集成任何新出现的单图像深度估计器，解决了现有方法在速度、准确性和可扩展性之间的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 当前端到端视频深度模型作为紧耦合系统，当更优的单图像深度估计器发布时会遭受显著的适应延迟。现有的后处理方法如NVDS虽然提供模块化即插即用的替代方案，但仍受限于速度、准确性和RGB依赖性，难以匹配端到端系统的效率和实用性。
AI.method: VDPP通过将范式从计算密集型的场景重建转变为目标导向的几何细化，纯几何精炼在低分辨率空间中进行，使用密集残差学习驱动几何表示而非完整重建。
AI.result: VDPP实现了超过43.5 FPS的推理速度（在NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano上），同时匹配端到端系统的时间一致性，在速度、准确性和内存效率之间提供了最优平衡。
AI.conclusion: VDPP在NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano上实现了43.5 FPS以上的推理速度，在速度、准确性和内存效率之间取得了最佳平衡，是实时边缘部署最实用的解决方案。其RGB无关架构确保了真正的可扩展性，可以立即集成任何新出现的图像深度模型。

relevance_reason: 虽然该论文涉及几何处理，但应用领域完全不同。该论文是关于视频深度估计和后处理，用于场景级3D重建。而研究档案是关于文本到运动生成(Text-to-Motion)、从视频提取人体运动、三维人体姿态估计等。两者虽然都涉及"3D"概念，但应用领域完全不同：一个用于场景深度估计，另一个用于人体运动生成。该论文不涉及任何文本到运动、视频生成模型质量评估、运动提取误差累积等研究档案中的核心问题。

title: A-MBER: Affective Memory Benchmark for Emotion Recognition
summary:
AI assistants that interact with users over time need to interpret the user's current emotional state in order to respond appropriately and personally. However, this capability remains insufficiently evaluated. Existing emotion datasets mainly assess local or instantaneous affect, while long-term memory benchmarks focus largely on factual recall, temporal consistency, or knowledge updating. As a result, current resources provide limited support for testing whether a model can use remembered interaction history to interpret a user's present affective state.
  We introduce A-MBER, an Affective Memory Benchmark for Emotion Recognition, to evaluate this capability. A-MBER focuses on present affective interpretation grounded in remembered multi-session interaction history. Given an interaction trajectory and a designated anchor turn, a model must infer the user's current affective state, identify historically relevant evidence, and justify its interpretation in a grounded way. The benchmark is constructed through a staged pipeline with explicit intermediate representations, including long-horizon planning, conversation generation, annotation, question construction, and final packaging. It supports judgment, retrieval, and explanation tasks, together with robustness settings such as modality degradation and insufficient-evidence conditions.
  Experiments compare local-context, long-context, retrieved-memory, structured-memory, and gold-evidence conditions within a unified framework. Results show that A-MBER is especially discriminative on the subsets it is designed to stress, including long-range implicit affect, high-dependency memory levels, trajectory-based reasoning, and adversarial settings. These findings suggest that memory supports affective interpretation not simply by providing more history, but by enabling more selective, grounded, and context-sensitive use of past interaction

AI.tldr: 论文提出A-MBER基准，用于评估AI助手利用长期交互记忆理解用户当前情感状态的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有情感数据集主要评估即时或局部情感，缺乏长期记忆测试；现有记忆基准关注事实回忆而非情感解释，无法验证模型是否能够利用交互历史理解用户当前情感状态。
AI.method: 通过多阶段管道构建A-MBER基准，包括长期规划、对话生成、注释、问题构建和打包。支持判断、检索、解释任务及鲁棒性测试。实验比较局部上下文、长上下文、检索记忆、结构化记忆和黄金证据等条件。
AI.result: A-MBER在长程隐含情感、高依赖记忆水平、基于轨迹推理和对抗性设置等压力子集上显示出强区分能力。记忆支持情感解释的关键在于选择性、grounded和上下文敏感地使用过去交互，而非仅提供更多历史。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了情感识别在长期记忆方面的评估空白，证明了记忆对情感理解的价值在于其能支持有选择性的、基于证据的上下文敏感推理。

relevance_reason: 该论文是关于情感识别和AI助手长期记忆的基准测试，与计算机图形学/Text-to-Motion领域完全无关。论文研究的是情感理解与记忆机制，应用领域是情感计算和人机对话，而研究Profile关注的是视频到三维运动的生成、姿态估计和骨架提取。两者在应用领域、方法论和研究问题上均不存在任何交集。

title: RASR: Retrieval-Augmented Semantic Reasoning for Fake News Video Detection
summary: Multimodal fake news video detection is a crucial research direction for maintaining the credibility of online information. Existing studies primarily verify content authenticity by constructing multimodal feature fusion representations or utilizing pre-trained language models to analyze video-text consistency. However, these methods still face the following limitations: (1) lacking cross-instance global semantic correlations, making it difficult to effectively utilize historical associative evidence to verify the current video; (2) semantic discrepancies across domains hinder the transfer of general knowledge, lacking the guidance of domain-specific expert knowledge. To this end, we propose a novel Retrieval-Augmented Semantic Reasoning (RASR) framework. First, a Cross-instance Semantic Parser and Retriever (CSPR) deconstructs the video into high-level semantic primitives and retrieves relevant associative evidence from a dynamic memory bank. Subsequently, a Domain-Guided Multimodal Reasoning (DGMP) module incorporates domain priors to drive an expert multimodal large language model in generating domain-aware, in-depth analysis reports. Finally, a Multi-View Feature Decoupling and Fusion (MVDFF) module integrates multi-dimensional features through an adaptive gating mechanism to achieve robust authenticity determination. Extensive experiments on the FakeSV and FakeTT datasets demonstrate that RASR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieves superior cross-domain generalization, and improves the overall detection accuracy by up to 0.93%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出检索增强语义推理(RASR)框架，用于多模态假新闻视频检测，通过跨实例语义解析器、领域引导多模态推理和多视角特征解耦融合模块，有效利用历史关联证据并结合领域专家知识，提升跨域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在两个主要局限：(1)缺乏跨实例全局语义关联，难以有效利用历史关联证据验证当前视频；(2)跨领域语义差异阻碍了通用知识迁移，缺乏领域特定专家知识的指导。
AI.method: 提出RASR框架包含三个核心模块：(1)跨实例语义解析与检索器(CSPR)将视频解构为高级语义原语并从动态记忆库中检索相关关联证据；(2)领域引导多模态推理(DGMP)模块结合领域先验知识，驱动专家多模态大语言模型生成领域感知的深度分析报告；(3)多视角特征解耦与融合(MVDFF)模块通过自适应门控机制整合多维特征，实现鲁棒的真实性判断。
AI.result: 在FakeSV和FakeTT数据集上的广泛实验表明，RASR显著优于现有最佳基线方法，实现了 superior cross-domain generalization，并提升了最高0.93%的整体检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: RASR框架通过结合检索增强和领域知识引导的方式，有效解决了假新闻视频检测中的跨实例语义关联和跨域泛化问题，为多模态虚假信息检测提供了新的研究思路。

While both use Vision Language Models (VLMs), this paper applies VLMs for truth verification and multi-modal reasoning about news content, not for 3D motion generation, pose estimation, skeleton extraction, or video-to-3D geometric mapping. The pain points mentioned (geometric mapping, scale consistency, motion extraction error) are completely unaddressed. This is a case of using similar methods (multi-modal reasoning) in a completely different domain.

title: Planning Task Shielding: Detecting and Repairing Flaws in Planning Tasks through Turning them Unsolvable
summary: Most research in planning focuses on generating a plan to achieve a desired set of goals. However, a goal specification can also be used to encode a property that should never hold, allowing a planner to identify a trace that would reach a flawed state. In such cases, the objective may shift to modifying the planning task to ensure that the flawed state is never reached-in other words, to make the planning task unsolvable. In this paper we introduce planning task shielding: the problem of detecting and repairing flaws in planning tasks. We propose $allmin$, an optimal algorithm that solves these tasks by minimally modifying the original actions to render the planning task unsolvable. We empirically evaluate the performance of $allmin$ in shielding planning tasks of increasing size, showing how it can effectively shield the system by turning the planning task unsolvable.

AI.tldr: 本文引入规划任务屏蔽问题，解决如何检测并修复规划任务中的缺陷，通过最小修改动作使规划任务无解来避免到达错误状态。
AI.motivation: 传统规划研究关注生成达成目标的计划，但当目标规格编码了不应成立的条件时，需要修改规划任务以防止到达错误状态，而非简单生成避免错误状态的计划。
AI.method: 提出allmin算法，通过最小修改原始动作集合，使原本可解的规划任务变得无解，从而实现屏蔽。
AI.result: 实验表明allmin能有效屏蔽规划任务，随着任务规模增大仍保持有效性。
AI.conclusion: allmin是解决规划任务屏蔽问题的最优算法，能够通过最小修改动作使规划任务无解，实现对错误状态的防护。

The application domain is AI planning (e.g., PDDL planning), not video-to-3D motion generation, pose estimation, skeleton extraction, or any computer graphics task. This is a fundamental domain mismatch.

title: EVGeoQA: Benchmarking LLMs on Dynamic, Multi-Objective Geo-Spatial Exploration
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable reasoning capabilities, their potential for purpose-driven exploration in dynamic geo-spatial environments remains under-investigated. Existing Geo-Spatial Question Answering (GSQA) benchmarks predominantly focus on static retrieval, failing to capture the complexity of real-world planning that involves dynamic user locations and compound constraints. To bridge this gap, we introduce EVGeoQA, a novel benchmark built upon Electric Vehicle (EV) charging scenarios that features a distinct location-anchored and dual-objective design. Specifically, each query in EVGeoQA is explicitly bound to a user's real-time coordinate and integrates the dual objectives of a charging necessity and a co-located activity preference. To systematically assess models in such complex settings, we further propose GeoRover, a general evaluation framework based on a tool-augmented agent architecture to evaluate the LLMs' capacity for dynamic, multi-objective exploration. Our experiments reveal that while LLMs successfully utilize tools to address sub-tasks, they struggle with long-range spatial exploration. Notably, we observe an emergent capability: LLMs can summarize historical exploration trajectories to enhance exploration efficiency. These findings establish EVGeoQA as a challenging testbed for future geo-spatial intelligence. The dataset and prompts are available at https://github.com/Hapluckyy/EVGeoQA/.

AI.tldr: 本文引入EVGeoQA基准测试，用于评估大型语言模型在动态地理空间环境中的目标驱动探索能力，特别关注电动汽车充电场景中的位置绑定和双目标设计。
AI.motivation: 现有地理空间问答基准主要关注静态检索，无法捕捉现实世界规划中的动态用户位置和复合约束的复杂性。LLMs在动态地理空间环境中的目的驱动探索潜力尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 提出GeoRover评估框架，基于工具增强的智能体架构，系统评估LLMs在复杂地理空间设置中的动态多目标探索能力。实验在EVGeoQA基准上进行。
AI.result: 实验表明LLMs成功利用工具解决子任务，但在长距离空间探索方面存在困难。同时发现LLMs具有总结历史探索轨迹以提高探索效率的 emergent capability。
AI.conclusion: EVGeoQA作为具有挑战性的地理空间智能测试平台，为未来地理空间智能研究提供了重要的基准和方向。

title: Improving Local Feature Matching by Entropy-inspired Scale Adaptability and Flow-endowed Local Consistency
summary: Recent semi-dense image matching methods have achieved remarkable success, but two long-standing issues still impair their performance. At the coarse stage, the over-exclusion issue of their mutual nearest neighbor (MNN) matching layer makes them struggle to handle cases with scale difference between images. To this end, we comprehensively revisit the matching mechanism and make a key observation that the hint concealed in the score matrix can be exploited to indicate the scale ratio. Based on this, we propose a scale-aware matching module which is exceptionally effective but introduces negligible overhead. At the fine stage, we point out that existing methods neglect the local consistency of final matches, which undermines their robustness. To this end, rather than independently predicting the correspondence for each source pixel, we reformulate the fine stage as a cascaded flow refinement problem and introduce a novel gradient loss to encourage local consistency of the flow field. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our novel matching pipeline, with these proposed modifications, achieves robust and accurate matching performance on downstream tasks.

AI.tldr: 针对半密集图像匹配中MNN过度排除和局部一致性问题，提出尺度感知匹配模块和级联流精炼方案，显著提升匹配鲁棒性和精度。
AI.motivation: 两个长期问题困扰半密集图像匹配方法：1) 粗阶段：互最近邻(MNN)匹配层的过度排除问题，难以处理图像间的尺度差异；2) 细阶段：忽视最终匹配的局部一致性，降低鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出尺度感知匹配模块，利用分数矩阵中的提示信息指示尺度比例；在细阶段将任务重构为级联流精炼问题，引入梯度损失来鼓励流场的局部一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，新颖的匹配流程在下游任务上实现了鲁棒且准确的匹配性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的修改方案有效解决了尺度差异和局部一致性问题，显著提升了半密集图像匹配的鲁棒性和精度。

relevance_reason: 该论文是关于半密集图像匹配的计算机视觉工作，与研究领域的Text-to-Motion/Video-to-Motion应用完全不同。虽然都属于广义的计算机图形学，但该论文解决的是图像特征匹配问题（尺度变化、本地一致性），而研究profile关注的是视频到三维运动的 geometric mapping、姿态估计、运动生成。虽然都涉及"匹配"概念，但应用领域截然不同：一个是图像匹配，一个是运动生成。该论文无法解决视频生成噪声累积、尺度一致性等pain points。

title: Reason in Chains, Learn in Trees: Self-Rectification and Grafting for Multi-turn Agent Policy Optimization
summary: Reinforcement learning for Large Language Model agents is often hindered by sparse rewards in multi-step reasoning tasks. Existing approaches like Group Relative Policy Optimization treat sampled trajectories as independent chains, assigning uniform credit to all steps in each chain and ignoring the existence of critical steps that may disproportionally impact reasoning outcome. In this paper, we propose T-STAR(Tree-structured Self-Taught Agent Rectification), a framework that recovers the latent correlated reward structure across seemingly independent trajectories. Specifically, we consolidate trajectories into a unified Cognitive Tree by identifying and merging functionally similar steps/nodes. It enables an Introspective Valuation mechanism that back-propagates trajectory-level rewards through the tree to obtain a new notion of variance-reduced relative advantage at step-level. Using the Cognitive Tree, we also develop In-Context Thought Grafting to synthesize corrective reasoning by contrasting successful and failed branches at critical divergence points/steps. Our proposed Surgical Policy Optimization then capitalizes on the rich policy gradient information concentrated at these critical points/steps through a Bradley-Terry type of surgical loss. Extensive experiments across embodied, interactive, reasoning, and planning benchmarks demonstrate that T-STAR achieves consistent improvements over strong baselines, with gains most pronounced on tasks requiring extended reasoning chains.

AI.tldr: T-STAR是一种针对大语言模型智能体的树结构自我教学修正框架，通过认知树整合轨迹并识别关键步骤，解决了强化学习中稀疏奖励和步骤级信用分配的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（如GRPO）将采样轨迹视为独立链，对链中所有步骤均匀分配信用，忽略了关键步骤对推理结果的不成比例影响，且未利用轨迹间的潜在关联结构。
AI.method: T-STAR框架包含三个核心组件：1) 认知树机制将相似步骤合并为统一树结构；2) 内省估值机制通过树结构反向传播轨迹级奖励获得低方差的相对优势；3) 对比式上下文思维嫁接在关键分歧点对比成功与失败分支；4) 布拉德斯特里型外科策略优化针对关键步骤集中优化策略梯度。
AI.result: 在嵌入式、交互式、推理和规划基准测试中，T-STAR相比强基线方法实现了一致的性能提升，且提升在使用较长推理链的任务上最为显著。
AI.conclusion: T-STAR通过认知树结构成功解决了传统方法中轨迹奖励均匀分配的问题，实现了关键步骤的精准优化，在需要长链推理的任务上提升最为显著。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agent policy optimization and reinforcement learning (T-STAR framework for improving reasoning in language models), which has NO connection to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion. The application domain is completely different - it's about LLM reasoning/agents, not about video-to-motion generation, pose estimation, skeleton extraction, or any computer graphics tasks. The methods (cognitive trees, reinforcement learning for LLMs) are entirely unrelated to video generation models, VLMs for motion quality assessment, or 3D motion generation.

title: Enhancing MLLM Spatial Understanding via Active 3D Scene Exploration for Multi-Perspective Reasoning
summary: Although Multimodal Large Language Models have achieved remarkable progress, they still struggle with complex 3D spatial reasoning due to the reliance on 2D visual priors. Existing approaches typically mitigate this limitation either through computationally expensive post-training procedures on limited 3D datasets or through rigid tool-calling mechanisms that lack explicit geometric understanding and viewpoint flexibility. To address these challenges, we propose a \textit{training-free} framework that introduces a Visual Chain-of-Thought mechanism grounded in explicit 3D reconstruction. The proposed pipeline first reconstructs a high-fidelity 3D mesh from a single image using MLLM-guided keyword extraction and mask generation at multiple granularities. Subsequently, the framework leverages an external knowledge base to iteratively compute optimal camera extrinsic parameters and synthesize novel views, thereby emulating human perspective-taking. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach significantly enhances spatial comprehension. Specifically, the framework outperforms specialized spatial models and general-purpose MLLMs, including \textit{GPT-5.2} and \textit{Gemini-2.5-Flash}, on major benchmarks such as 3DSRBench and Rel3D.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的视觉思维链框架来解决多模态大语言模型在3D空间推理方面的局限性。该方法通过MLLM引导从单图像重建高保真3D网格，并利用外部知识库迭代计算最优相机参数合成新视图，模拟人类视角获取。实验表明该方法在3DSRBench和Rel3D等基准测试中超越了GPT-5.2和Gemini-2.5-Flash等先进模型。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)在复杂3D空间推理方面存在困难，主要因为它们依赖2D视觉先验。现有的解决方案要么需要计算昂贵的3D数据集后训练，要么缺乏明确的几何理解和视角灵活性。
AI.method: 提出了一个无需训练的框架，引入基于显式3D重建的视觉思维链机制。具体包括：(1)使用MLLM引导的关键词提取和多粒度掩码生成，从单图像重建高保真3D网格；(2)利用外部知识库迭代计算最优相机外参并合成新视图，模拟人类视角获取。
AI.result: 在3DSRBench和Rel3D等主要基准测试中，该框架显著优于专用空间模型和通用MLLMs（包括GPT-5.2和Gemini-2.5-Flash）。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过将2D视觉先验转换为显式3D重建，无需额外训练即可显著增强模型的空间理解能力，为多模态模型的3D推理提供了新的有效途径。

relevance_reason: 该论文是关于多模态大语言模型(MLLM)的3D空间推理和从单图像进行3D重建，属于计算机视觉/3D视觉领域。而研究profile是关于计算机图形学/文本到运动(Video-to-Motion)，涉及从视频中提取运动、姿态估计、骨骼提取等。虽然两者都提到了VLM方法，但应用领域完全不同：该论文关注3D场景理解和空间推理，而profile关注视频到3D运动的几何映射。这是两个完全不同的应用领域，因此相关性很低。

title: URMF: Uncertainty-aware Robust Multimodal Fusion for Multimodal Sarcasm Detection
summary: Multimodal sarcasm detection (MSD) aims to identify sarcastic intent from semantic incongruity between text and image. Although recent methods have improved MSD through cross-modal interaction and incongruity reasoning, they often assume that all modalities are equally reliable. In real-world social media, however, textual content may be ambiguous and visual content may be weakly relevant or even irrelevant, causing deterministic fusion to introduce noisy evidence and weaken robust reasoning. To address this issue, we propose Uncertainty-aware Robust Multimodal Fusion (URMF), a unified framework that explicitly models modality reliability during interaction and fusion. URMF first employs multi-head cross-attention to inject visual evidence into textual representations, followed by multi-head self-attention in the fused semantic space to enhance incongruity-aware reasoning. It then performs unified unimodal aleatoric uncertainty modeling over text, image, and interaction-aware latent representations by parameterizing each modality as a learnable Gaussian posterior. The estimated uncertainty is further used to dynamically regulate modality contributions during fusion, suppressing unreliable modalities and yielding a more robust joint representation. In addition, we design a joint training objective integrating task supervision, modality prior regularization, cross-modal distribution alignment, and uncertainty-driven self-sampling contrastive learning. Experiments on public MSD benchmarks show that URMF consistently outperforms strong unimodal, multimodal, and MLLM-based baselines, demonstrating the effectiveness of uncertainty-aware fusion for improving both accuracy and robustness.

AI.tldr: URMF是一种不确定性感知的鲁棒多模态融合框架，通过显式建模模态可靠性来解决多模态 sarcasm 检测中模态不可靠问题，使用交叉/自注意力融合和Gaussian后验不确定性建模动态调节模态贡献，并在公开基准上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设所有模态同等可靠，但实际社交媒体中文本可能模糊、视觉内容可能弱相关甚至无关，导致确定性融合引入噪声证据，削弱鲁棒推理能力。
AI.method: 提出统一框架URMF，包含：1）多头交叉注意力将视觉信息注入文本表示；2）多头自注意力在融合语义空间增强不一致性推理；3）将每种模态参数化为可学习的Gaussian后验进行统一不确定性建模；4）利用估计的不确定性动态调节模态贡献；5）设计联合训练目标：任务监督、模态先验正则、跨模态分布对齐、不确定性驱动的自采样对比学习。
AI.result: 在公开MSD基准上一致优于强单模态、多模态和MLLM基线，验证了不确定性感知融合对提升准确性和鲁棒性的有效性。
AI.conclusion: URMF通过不确定性感知融合机制有效解决了多模态 sarcasm 检测中模态不可靠的问题，实验表明该方法在公开基准上显著优于单模态、多模态和基于MLLM的强基线模型，同时提升了准确性和鲁棒性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multimodal sarcasm detection in social media (text + image/video for detecting sarcasm). The application domain is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion. While the paper uses multimodal fusion techniques and uncertainty modeling, these are applied to sentiment analysis/sarcasm detection tasks, NOT to video-to-3D motion generation, pose estimation, skeleton extraction, or any computer graphics tasks. The research profile focuses on geometric mapping from 2D video to 3D motion, VLM quality evaluation for motion generation, and error accumulation in motion extraction - none of which are addressed by this paper. The application domain is entirely different (social media text/image understanding vs. motion generation).

title: LiveStre4m: Feed-Forward Live Streaming of Novel Views from Unposed Multi-View Video
summary: Live-streaming Novel View Synthesis (NVS) from unposed multi-view video remains an open challenge in a wide range of applications. Existing methods for dynamic scene representation typically require ground-truth camera parameters and involve lengthy optimizations ($\approx 2.67$s), which makes them unsuitable for live streaming scenarios. To address this issue, we propose a novel viewpoint video live-streaming method (LiveStre4m), a feed-forward model for real-time NVS from unposed sparse multi-view inputs. LiveStre4m introduces a multi-view vision transformer for keyframe 3D scene reconstruction coupled with a diffusion-transformer interpolation module that ensures temporal consistency and stable streaming. In addition, a Camera Pose Predictor module is proposed to efficiently estimate both poses and intrinsics directly from RGB images, removing the reliance on known camera calibration information. Our approach enables temporally consistent novel-view video streaming in real-time using as few as two synchronized unposed input streams. LiveStre4m attains an average reconstruction time of $ 0.07$s per-frame at $ 1024 \times 768$ resolution, outperforming the optimization-based dynamic scene representation methods by orders of magnitude in runtime. These results demonstrate that LiveStre4m makes real-time NVS streaming feasible in practical settings, marking a substantial step toward deployable live novel-view synthesis systems. Code available at: https://github.com/pedro-quesado/LiveStre4m

AI.tldr: LiveStre4m是一种用于从无姿态多视角视频进行实时新视角合成的 feed-forward 模型，能够在仅使用两个同步输入流的情况下实现时间一致的新视角视频流式传输。
AI.motivation: 现有的动态场景表示方法通常需要地面真实相机参数（ground-truth camera parameters），并且涉及耗时的优化过程（约2.67秒），这使得它们不适合直播场景中的应用。
AI.method: 提出三个关键模块：1) 多视角视觉Transformer（Multi-view Vision Transformer）用于关键帧3D场景重建；2) Diffusion-Transformer插值模块确保时间一致性和稳定流式传输；3) 相机姿态预测器模块（Camera Pose Predictor）直接从RGB图像估计姿态和内参，消除对已知相机校准信息的依赖。
AI.result: 在1024×768分辨率下达到平均0.07秒/帧的重建速度，比基于优化的动态场景表示方法在运行时间上快几个数量级。
AI.conclusion: LiveStre4m使得实时NVS流式传输在实际应用中变得可行，代表了可部署的实时新视角合成系统的重要进步。

relevance_reason: The paper is about novel view synthesis from multi-view video (3D scene reconstruction), NOT about Text-to-Motion or human motion generation. While it uses Diffusion-Transformer and camera pose estimation, these are applied to a DIFFERENT application domain - scene-level view synthesis rather than human motion generation. The pain points in the profile are about 2D video to 3D human motion geometric mapping, VLM quality assessment, and video generation error accumulation for motion extraction - none of which this paper addresses. This is a computer vision/graphics scene reconstruction paper, not a text-to-motion or human motion generation paper.

title: From Static to Interactive: Adapting Visual in-Context Learners for User-Driven Tasks
summary: Visual in-context learning models are designed to adapt to new tasks by leveraging a set of example input-output pairs, enabling rapid generalization without task-specific fine-tuning. However, these models operate in a fundamentally static paradigm: while they can adapt to new tasks, they lack any mechanism to incorporate user-provided guidance signals such as scribbles, clicks, or bounding boxes to steer or refine the prediction process. This limitation is particularly restrictive in real-world applications, where users want to actively guide model predictions, e.g., by highlighting the target object for segmentation, indicating a region which should be visually altered, or isolating a specific person in a complex scene to run targeted pose estimation. In this work, we propose a simple method to transform static visual in-context learners, particularly the DeLVM approach, into highly controllable, user-driven systems, i.e., Interactive DeLVM, enabling seamless interaction through natural visual cues such as scribbles, clicks, or drawing boxes. Specifically, by encoding interactions directly into the example input-output pairs, we keep the philosophy of visual in-context learning intact: enabling users to prompt models with unseen interactions without fine-tuning and empowering them to dynamically steer model predictions with personalized interactions. Our experiments demonstrate that SOTA visual in-context learning models fail to effectively leverage interaction cues, often ignoring user guidance entirely. In contrast, our method excels in controllable, user-guided scenarios, achieving improvements of $+7.95%$ IoU for interactive segmentation, $+2.46$ PSNR for directed super-resolution, and $-3.14%$ LPIPS for interactive object removal. With this, our work bridges the gap between rigid static task adaptation and fluid interactivity for user-centric visual in-context learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Interactive DeLVM方法，将静态的视觉上下文学习模型转换为可交互的用户驱动系统，通过将交互信号（涂鸦、点击、边界框）编码到示例输入-输出对中，实现用户对模型预测的动态引导。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉上下文学习模型虽然可以适应新任务，但缺乏用户交互机制，无法接收用户的指导信号如涂鸦、点击或边界框来调整预测，这在实际应用中受到限制，因为用户通常需要主动引导模型预测。
AI.method: 将交互信号直接编码到示例输入-输出对中，保持视觉上下文学习的理念不变，使用户能够通过未见过的交互提示模型，无需微调即可动态引导模型预测。
AI.result: 实验表明，最先进的视觉上下文学习模型无法有效利用交互信号，而本文方法在可控的用户引导场景中表现出色：交互分割IoU提升+7.95%，定向超分辨率PSNR提升+2.46，交互对象去除LPIPS降低-3.14%。
AI.conclusion: 本文工作弥合了僵化的静态任务适应与灵活的用于以用户为中心的视觉上下文学习之间的差距，使视觉上下文学习模型具备用户交互能力。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on visual in-context learning for interactive image/video manipulation tasks (segmentation, super-resolution, object removal), not text-to-motion generation or 3D motion generation. The application domain is completely different - it's about general image/video editing rather than human motion generation from video. While it mentions VLM, the method and application are unrelated to the research profile's focus on video-to-3D motion extraction, pose estimation, and skeleton extraction for motion generation.

title: How Well Do Vision-Language Models Understand Sequential Driving Scenes? A Sensitivity Study
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly proposed for autonomous driving tasks, yet their performance on sequential driving scenes remains poorly characterized, particularly regarding how input configurations affect their capabilities. We introduce VENUSS (VLM Evaluation oN Understanding Sequential Scenes), a framework for systematic sensitivity analysis of VLM performance on sequential driving scenes, establishing baselines for future research. Building upon existing datasets, VENUSS extracts temporal sequences from driving videos, and generates structured evaluations across custom categories. By comparing 25+ existing VLMs across 2,600+ scenarios, we reveal how even top models achieve only 57% accuracy, not matching human performance in similar constraints (65%) and exposing significant capability gaps. Our analysis shows that VLMs excel with static object detection but struggle with understanding the vehicle dynamics and temporal relations. VENUSS offers the first systematic sensitivity analysis of VLMs focused on how input image configurations - resolution, frame count, temporal intervals, spatial layouts, and presentation modes - affect performance on sequential driving scenes. Supplementary material available at https://V3NU55.github.io

AI.tldr: VENUSS是一个用于系统分析VLM在连续驾驶场景中性能的框架，通过对25个以上模型在2600多个场景中的评估，发现顶级模型准确率仅57%，低于人类基准的65%，揭示了VLM在车辆动态理解和时序关系推理方面的显著能力差距。
AI.motivation: 当前VLMs在自动驾驶任务中的应用日益增多，但其在连续驾驶场景中的性能表现缺乏系统性的表征，特别是输入配置如何影响其能力尚不明确。
AI.method: VENUSS框架从驾驶视频中提取时间序列，并在自定义类别上进行结构化评估。研究对比了25个以上现有VLM模型，涵盖2600多个场景，分析了输入图像配置（分辨率、帧数、时间间隔、空间布局和呈现模式）对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 即使是表现最佳的模型也仅达到57%的准确率，无法匹配人类在类似约束条件下的表现（65%）。分析表明VLMs在静态目标检测方面表现良好，但在理解车辆动态和时序关系方面存在明显不足。
AI.conclusion: VENUSS是首个系统性地分析VLMs在连续驾驶场景中表现的框架，揭示了当前VLMs与人类驾驶理解能力之间存在显著差距。该研究为未来VLM在自动驾驶领域的研究提供了重要的基线和方向指引。

relevance_reason: This paper evaluates VLMs on autonomous driving scene understanding (vehicle dynamics, temporal relationships), which is a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion. While both involve VLMs, this paper focuses on driving scenarios and vehicle behavior understanding, not 2D-to-3D motion extraction, pose estimation, skeleton extraction, or video-to-motion generation. It does not address any of the specified pain points: geometric mapping from 2D video to 3D motion, scale consistency, VLM quality evaluation for motion generation, or video generation noise affecting motion extraction.

title: FlowExtract: Procedural Knowledge Extraction from Maintenance Flowcharts
summary: Maintenance procedures in manufacturing facilities are often documented as flowcharts in static PDFs or scanned images. They encode procedural knowledge essential for asset lifecycle management, yet inaccessible to modern operator support systems. Vision-language models, the dominant paradigm for image understanding, struggle to reconstruct connection topology from such diagrams. We present FlowExtract, a pipeline for extracting directed graphs from ISO 5807-standardized flowcharts. The system separates element detection from connectivity reconstruction, using YOLOv8 and EasyOCR for standard domain-aligned node detection and text extraction, combined with a novel edge detection method that analyzes arrowhead orientations and traces connecting lines backward to source nodes. Evaluated on industrial troubleshooting guides, FlowExtract achieves very high node detection and substantially outperforms vision-language model baselines on edge extraction, offering organizations a practical path toward queryable procedural knowledge representations. The implementation is available athttps://github.com/guille-gil/FlowExtract.

AI.tldr: FlowExtract是一个从ISO 5807标准化流程图中提取有向图的管道系统，分离元素检测与连接性重建，使用YOLOv8和EasyOCR进行节点检测和文本提取，并提出分析箭头方向和反向追踪连接线的新颖边缘检测方法。
AI.motivation: 制造业设施的维护程序通常以静态PDF或扫描图像中的流程图形式记录，其中包含对资产生命周期管理至关重要的程序性知识，但这些知识无法被现代操作支持系统访问。 vision-language models难以从此类图表中重建连接拓扑。
AI.method: 该系统将元素检测与连接性重建分离，使用YOLOv8和EasyOCR进行标准域对齐的节点检测和文本提取，并结合一种新颖的边缘检测方法，该方法分析箭头方向并反向追踪连接线到源节点。
AI.result: 在工业故障排除指南上评估，FlowExtract实现了非常高的节点检测性能，并在边缘提取方面显著优于vision-language model基线，为组织提供了通往可查询程序性知识表示的实际路径。
AI.conclusion: FlowExtract提供了一种实用的方法来从静态流程图中提取结构化知识，能够实现程序性知识的查询和利用，性能优于现有的vision-language模型方法。

relevance_reason: The paper is about extracting procedural knowledge from maintenance flowcharts (document understanding/knowledge extraction in manufacturing), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion. Completely different application domain - the paper deals with flowchart parsing, not video generation, 3D motion generation, pose estimation, or skeleton extraction. The methods (YOLOv8, EasyOCR for flowchart extraction) are unrelated to the specified methods (Video Generation Models, VLM, 3D Motion Generation, Pose Estimation, Skeleton Extraction).

title: Walk the Talk: Bridging the Reasoning-Action Gap for Thinking with Images via Multimodal Agentic Policy Optimization
summary: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have incentivized models to ``think with images'' by actively invoking visual tools during multi-turn reasoning. The common Reinforcement Learning (RL) practice of relying on outcome-based rewards ignores the fact that textual plausibility often masks executive failure, meaning that models may exhibit intuitive textual reasoning while executing imprecise or irrelevant visual actions within their agentic reasoning trajectories. This reasoning-action discrepancy introduces noise that accumulates throughout the multi-turn reasoning process, severely degrading the model's multimodal reasoning capabilities and potentially leading to training collapse. In this paper, we introduce Multimodal Agentic Policy Optimization (MAPO), bridging the gap between textual reasoning and visual actions generated by models within their Multimodal Chain-of-Thought (MCoT). Specifically, MAPO mandates the model to generate explicit textual descriptions for the visual content obtained via tool usage. We then employ a novel advantage estimation that couples the semantic alignment between these descriptions and the actual observations with the task reward. Theoretical findings are provided to justify the rationale behind MAPO, which inherently reduces the variance of gradients, and extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance across multiple visual reasoning benchmarks.

AI.tldr: MAPO通过要求模型生成视觉工具获取内容的显式文本描述，并结合语义对齐与任务奖励进行优势估计，解决多模态大语言模型中文本推理与视觉动作执行不一致导致的训练崩溃问题。
AI.motivation: 现有RL方法仅依赖结果奖励，忽略了文本推理与视觉动作执行之间的差异。模型可能产生看似合理但实际执行错误或不相关的视觉动作，这种推理-动作不一致会在多轮推理中累积噪声，严重损害模型的多模态推理能力甚至导致训练崩溃。
AI.method: 提出多模态智能体策略优化(MAPO)：1)强制模型生成视觉工具获取内容的显式文本描述；2)设计新型优势估计，将描述与实际观测的语义对齐程度与任务奖励耦合。
AI.result: 理论分析证明MAPO能降低梯度方差。实验表明该方法在多个视觉推理基准上取得最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模文本推理与视觉动作的语义对齐，MAPO有效解决了多模态LLM训练中的关键问题，为提升多模态推理能力提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multimodal LLM reasoning-action alignment (using RL to bridge text reasoning and visual action execution in multimodal LLMs), which is completely unrelated to the research profile's domain of Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion. The research profile focuses on 2D video to 3D motion generation, geometric mapping, pose estimation, skeleton extraction, and video generation models (万相/Seedance). The paper addresses a completely different application domain (visual reasoning in LLMs) and uses different methods (RL-based policy optimization for reasoning-action alignment), not 3D motion generation or video-to-motion tasks.

title: EventFace: Event-Based Face Recognition via Structure-Driven Spatiotemporal Modeling
summary: Event cameras offer a promising sensing modality for face recognition due to their inherent advantages in illumination robustness and privacy-friendliness. However, because event streams lack the stable photometric appearance relied upon by conventional RGB-based face recognition systems, we argue that event-based face recognition should model structure-driven spatiotemporal identity representations shaped by rigid facial motion and individual facial geometry. Since dedicated datasets for event-based face recognition remain lacking, we construct EFace, a small-scale event-based face dataset captured under rigid facial motion. To learn effectively from this limited event data, we further propose EventFace, a framework for event-based face recognition that integrates spatial structure and temporal dynamics for identity modeling. Specifically, we employ Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) to transfer structural facial priors from pretrained RGB face models to the event domain, thereby establishing a reliable spatial basis for identity modeling. Building on this foundation, we further introduce a Motion Prompt Encoder (MPE) to explicitly encode temporal features and a Spatiotemporal Modulator (STM) to fuse them with spatial features, thereby enhancing the representation of identity-relevant event patterns. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EventFace achieves the best performance among the evaluated baselines, with a Rank-1 identification rate of 94.19% and an equal error rate (EER) of 5.35%. Results further indicate that EventFace exhibits stronger robustness under degraded illumination than the competing methods. In addition, the learned representations exhibit reduced template reconstructability.

AI.tldr: EventFace是一个基于事件相机的人脸识别框架，通过整合空间结构和时间动力学进行身份建模。构建了EFace事件人脸数据集，并利用LoRA从预训练RGB模型迁移结构先验，同时引入运动提示编码器和时空调制器增强身份相关事件模式的表示。
AI.motivation: 事件相机具有光照鲁棒性和隐私友好性优势，但事件流缺乏传统RGB人脸识别依赖的稳定光度外观。因此事件-based人脸识别应建模由刚性面部运动和个体几何结构驱动的时空身份表示，且当时缺乏专用数据集。
AI.method: 1)构建EFace小规模事件人脸数据集；2)使用LoRA将预训练RGB人脸模型的结构面部先验迁移到事件域；3)引入运动提示编码器(MPE)显式编码时间特征；4)设计时空调制器(STM)融合时间与空间特征。
AI.result: Rank-1识别率达94.19%，等错误率(EER)为5.35%，在光照退化条件下比竞争方法具有更强鲁棒性，学习到的表示具有更低的模板可重建性。
AI.conclusion: EventFace在事件人脸识别任务中达到最佳性能，有效解决了事件数据有限情况下的学习问题，通过结构先验迁移和时空建模提升了身份识别准确率和光照鲁棒性，同时增强了隐私保护能力。

relevance_reason: 完全不同的应用领域。该论文是关于事件相机的人脸识别（生物特征识别），而研究Profile是计算机图形学/文本到动作生成。虽然该论文使用了LoRA和时空建模等技术，但应用在脸部的身份识别/验证，而非人体运动生成、姿态估计或骨架提取。这完全偏离了视频到三维运动、文本到动作、三维动作生成的核心研究领域。

title: FedDAP: Domain-Aware Prototype Learning for Federated Learning under Domain Shift
summary: Federated Learning (FL) enables decentralized model training across multiple clients without exposing private data, making it ideal for privacy-sensitive applications. However, in real-world FL scenarios, clients often hold data from distinct domains, leading to severe domain shift and degraded global model performance. To address this, prototype learning has been emerged as a promising solution, which leverages class-wise feature representations. Yet, existing methods face two key limitations: (1) Existing prototype-based FL methods typically construct a $\textit{single global prototype}$ per class by aggregating local prototypes from all clients without preserving domain information. (2) Current feature-prototype alignment is $\textit{domain-agnostic}$, forcing clients to align with global prototypes regardless of domain origin. To address these challenges, we propose Federated Domain-Aware Prototypes (FedDAP) to construct domain-specific global prototypes by aggregating local client prototypes within the same domain using a similarity-weighted fusion mechanism. These global domain-specific prototypes are then used to guide local training by aligning local features with prototypes from the same domain, while encouraging separation from prototypes of different domains. This dual alignment enhances domain-specific learning at the local level and enables the global model to generalize across diverse domains. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on three different datasets: DomainNet, Office-10, and PACS to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework to address the domain shift challenges. The code is available at https://github.com/quanghuy6997/FedDAP.

AI.tldr: 针对联邦学习中跨领域数据导致的领域偏移问题，提出FedDAP通过构建领域特定的全局原型并实施领域感知的特征对齐来提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 在现实世界的联邦学习场景中，客户端持有来自不同领域的数据，导致严重的领域偏移问题，现有的原型方法存在两个关键局限：(1) 构建单一全局原型而未保留领域信息；(2) 特征-原型对齐是领域无关的，强制客户端与全局原型对齐。
AI.method: 提出FedDAP框架，通过相似度加权融合机制构建领域特定的全局原型，使用双对齐策略：使本地特征与同领域原型对齐，同时鼓励与不同领域原型分离。
AI.result: 在DomainNet、Office-10和PACS三个数据集上验证了框架有效性，能够有效应对领域偏移挑战。
AI.conclusion: FedDAP通过领域特定的原型学习增强了本地领域的特异性学习，使全局模型能够泛化到不同领域。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Federated Learning and domain adaptation - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion. It addresses domain shift in federated learning through prototype learning, which has no connection to video-to-motion generation, pose estimation, skeleton extraction, or any of the methods/methods mentioned in the research profile. The application domain is entirely different (general ML vs computer graphics/motion generation).

title: Physical Adversarial Attacks on AI Surveillance Systems:Detection, Tracking, and Visible--Infrared Evasion
summary: Physical adversarial attacks are increasingly studied in settings that resemble deployed surveillance systems rather than isolated image benchmarks. In these settings, person detection, multi-object tracking, visible--infrared sensing, and the practical form of the attack carrier all matter at once. This changes how the literature should be read. A perturbation that suppresses a detector in one frame may have limited practical effect if identity is recovered over time; an RGB-only result may say little about night-time systems that rely on visible and thermal inputs together; and a conspicuous patch can imply a different threat model from a wearable or selectively activated carrier. This paper reviews physical attacks from that surveillance-oriented viewpoint. Rather than attempting a complete catalogue of all physical attacks in computer vision, we focus on the technical questions that become central in surveillance: temporal persistence, sensing modality, carrier realism, and system-level objective. We organize prior work through a four-part taxonomy and discuss how recent results on multi-object tracking, dual-modal visible--infrared evasion, and controllable clothing reflect a broader change in the field. We also summarize evaluation practices and unresolved gaps, including distance robustness, camera-pipeline variation, identity-level metrics, and activation-aware testing. The resulting picture is that surveillance robustness cannot be judged reliably from isolated per-frame benchmarks alone; it has to be examined as a system problem unfolding over time, across sensors, and under realistic physical deployment constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文是一篇关于物理对抗攻击的综述论文，从监控系统的角度重新审视物理对抗攻击，探讨了时间持久性、感知模态、载体现实性和系统级目标等核心问题。
AI.motivation: 当前物理对抗攻击研究逐渐转向实际部署的监控系统场景，但现有文献缺乏从这一角度的系统性分析。传统孤立基准测试无法可靠评估监控系统的鲁棒性，需要从时间、传感器和物理部署约束等多维度进行评估。
AI.method: 作者提出了一个四部分类法，组织了物理对抗攻击领域的研究工作，涵盖多目标跟踪、可见光-红外双模态规避和可控服装等主题，并总结了当前评估实践和未解决的差距。
AI.result: 研究表明，监控鲁棒性不能仅从孤立的首帧基准测试来可靠判断；它必须作为随时间展开、跨传感器并在现实物理部署约束下的系统问题来检验。
AI.conclusion: 物理对抗攻击在监控场景下需要考虑时序持久性、感知模态、载体现实性和系统级目标；未来研究应关注距离鲁棒性、相机流程变化、身份级指标和激活感知测试等未解决问题。

title: Video-guided Machine Translation with Global Video Context
summary: Video-guided Multimodal Translation (VMT) has advanced significantly in recent years. However, most existing methods rely on locally aligned video segments paired one-to-one with subtitles, limiting their ability to capture global narrative context across multiple segments in long videos. To overcome this limitation, we propose a globally video-guided multimodal translation framework that leverages a pretrained semantic encoder and vector database-based subtitle retrieval to construct a context set of video segments closely related to the target subtitle semantics. An attention mechanism is employed to focus on highly relevant visual content, while preserving the remaining video features to retain broader contextual information. Furthermore, we design a region-aware cross-modal attention mechanism to enhance semantic alignment during translation. Experiments on a large-scale documentary translation dataset demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms baseline models, highlighting its effectiveness in long-video scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出全局视频引导多模态翻译框架，通过预训练语义编码器、向量数据库字幕检索和区域感知跨模态注意力机制，有效解决长视频翻译中全局上下文捕捉不足的问题，实验表明该方法显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法局限：大多数现有视频引导多模态翻译方法依赖于本地对齐的视频片段与字幕的一对一配对，难以捕捉长视频中多个片段间的全局叙事上下文。
AI.method: 提出全局视频引导多模态翻译框架，包含三个关键技术：1）预训练语义编码器与基于向量数据库的字幕检索，构建与目标字幕语义紧密相关的视频片段上下文集；2）注意力机制聚焦高度相关的视觉内容同时保留剩余视频特征以维持更广泛的上下文信息；3）区域感知跨模态注意力机制增强翻译过程中的语义对齐。
AI.result: 在大型纪录片翻译数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于基线模型，在长视频场景中表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出的全局视频引导多模态翻译框架有效解决了长视频中全局叙事上下文捕捉不足的问题，通过预训练语义编码器、向量数据库字幕检索和区域感知跨模态注意力机制，显著提升了翻译质量，特别是在长视频场景中表现优异。

The application domains are completely different - this paper deals with language translation, not motion generation or computer graphics. Despite both dealing with video, the end goal and methodology are entirely different fields.

title: Multi-modal user interface control detection using cross-attention
summary: Detecting user interface (UI) controls from software screenshots is a critical task for automated testing, accessibility, and software analytics, yet it remains challenging due to visual ambiguities, design variability, and the lack of contextual cues in pixel-only approaches. In this paper, we introduce a novel multi-modal extension of YOLOv5 that integrates GPT-generated textual descriptions of UI images into the detection pipeline through cross-attention modules. By aligning visual features with semantic information derived from text embeddings, our model enables more robust and context-aware UI control detection. We evaluate the proposed framework on a large dataset of over 16,000 annotated UI screenshots spanning 23 control classes. Extensive experiments compare three fusion strategies, i.e. element-wise addition, weighted sum, and convolutional fusion, demonstrating consistent improvements over the baseline YOLOv5 model. Among these, convolutional fusion achieved the strongest performance, with significant gains in detecting semantically complex or visually ambiguous classes. These results establish that combining visual and textual modalities can substantially enhance UI element detection, particularly in edge cases where visual information alone is insufficient. Our findings open promising opportunities for more reliable and intelligent tools in software testing, accessibility support, and UI analytics, setting the stage for future research on efficient, robust, and generalizable multi-modal detection systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模态YOLOv5扩展方法，通过GPT生成的文本描述与视觉特征融合，提升UI控件检测性能，在16,000+截图数据集上实现显著改进。
AI.motivation: UI控件检测在自动化测试、无障碍访问和软件分析中至关重要，但现有仅基于像素的方法面临视觉歧义、设计变化和缺乏上下文信息的挑战。
AI.method: 提出一种多模态YOLOv5扩展，通过跨注意力模块将GPT生成的UI图像文本描述整合到检测流程中，实现视觉特征与文本嵌入语义信息的对齐。实验中比较了三种融合策略：逐元素相加、加权求和和卷积融合。
AI.result: 在包含23类控件、超过16,000张标注UI截图的大型数据集上评估，卷积融合策略表现最佳，显著提升了语义复杂或视觉模糊类别的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 结合视觉和文本模态可显著增强UI元素检测能力，尤其在仅凭视觉信息不足的边缘情况下效果明显，为软件测试、无障碍支持和UI分析的智能工具开发开辟了新途径。

title: Generate, Analyze, and Refine: Training-Free Sound Source Localization via MLLM Meta-Reasoning
summary: Sound source localization task aims to identify the locations of sound-emitting objects by leveraging correlations between audio and visual modalities. Most existing SSL methods rely on contrastive learning-based feature matching, but lack explicit reasoning and verification, limiting their effectiveness in complex acoustic scenes. Inspired by human meta-cognitive processes, we propose a training-free SSL framework that exploits the intrinsic reasoning capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). Our Generation-Analysis-Refinement (GAR) pipeline consists of three stages: Generation produces initial bounding boxes and audio classifications; Analysis quantifies Audio-Visual Consistency via open-set role tagging and anchor voting; and Refinement applies adaptive gating to prevent unnecessary adjustments. Extensive experiments on single-source and multi-source benchmarks demonstrate competitive performance. The source code is available at https://github.com/VisualAIKHU/GAR-SSL.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)的无训练声源定位(GAR)框架，通过生成-分析- refinement三个阶段实现音频-视觉一致性验证，在单源和多源基准数据集上取得了竞争力的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有SSL方法依赖于对比学习特征匹配，缺乏显式的推理和验证机制，在复杂声学场景中效果受限。作者受人类元认知过程启发，试图利用MLLMs内在的推理能力来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出了一个训练-free的GAR pipeline，包含三个阶段：1)Generation生成初始边界框和音频分类；2)Analysis通过开放集角色标注和锚点投票量化音频-视觉一致性；3)Refinement应用自适应门控防止不必要的调整。
AI.result: 在单源和多源基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，证明了该方法的竞争力性能。
AI.conclusion: 该工作创新性地将MLLMs的推理能力应用于声源定位任务，无需训练即可实现有效的音频-视觉一致性验证，为复杂声学场景中的声源定位提供了新的思路。

While the profile deals with 3D motion generation from videos (video-to-motion, pose estimation, skeleton extraction), this paper addresses audio-visual consistency verification for sound detection. The application domain is entirely different (computer graphics motion generation vs. audio-visual sound localization), despite both potentially using vision-language models.

title: CAAP: Capture-Aware Adversarial Patch Attacks on Palmprint Recognition Models
summary: Palmprint recognition is deployed in security-critical applications, including access control and palm-based payment, due to its contactless acquisition and highly discriminative ridge-and-crease textures. However, the robustness of deep palmprint recognition systems against physically realizable attacks remains insufficiently understood. Existing studies are largely confined to the digital setting and do not adequately account for the texture-dominant nature of palmprint recognition or the distortions introduced during physical acquisition. To address this gap, we propose CAAP, a capture-aware adversarial patch framework for palmprint recognition. CAAP learns a universal patch that can be reused across inputs while remaining effective under realistic acquisition variation. To match the structural characteristics of palmprints, the framework adopts a cross-shaped patch topology, which enlarges spatial coverage under a fixed pixel budget and more effectively disrupts long-range texture continuity. CAAP further integrates three modules: ASIT for input-conditioned patch rendering, RaS for stochastic capture-aware simulation, and MS-DIFE for feature-level identity-disruptive guidance. We evaluate CAAP on the Tongji, IITD, and AISEC datasets against generic CNN backbones and palmprint-specific recognition models. Experiments show that CAAP achieves strong untargeted and targeted attack performance with favorable cross-model and cross-dataset transferability. The results further show that, although adversarial training can partially reduce the attack success rate, substantial residual vulnerability remains. These findings indicate that deep palmprint recognition systems remain vulnerable to physically realizable, capture-aware adversarial patch attacks, underscoring the need for more effective defenses in practice. Code available at https://github.com/ryliu68/CAAP.

AI.tldr: CAAP是一个面向掌纹识别的捕获感知对抗贴片攻击框架，通过十字形拓扑结构和ASIT、RaS、MS-DIFE三个模块实现可迁移的物理对抗攻击，实验证实在多个数据集和模型上具有高攻击成功率，且对抗训练无法完全防御。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要局限于数字设置，未充分考虑掌纹识别的纹理主导特性以及物理采集过程中引入的失真，因此深度掌纹识别系统对物理可实现攻击的鲁棒性仍缺乏充分理解。
AI.method: 提出CAAP框架，包含三个核心模块：ASIT（输入条件化贴片渲染）、RaS（随机捕获感知模拟）和MS-DIFE（特征级身份破坏引导）。采用十字形贴片拓扑结构以在固定像素预算下扩大空间覆盖范围并更有效地破坏长程纹理连续性。
AI.result: CAAP在Tongji、IITD和AISEC数据集上针对通用CNN主干网和特定掌纹识别模型进行了评估，表现出强大的非定向和定向攻击性能，具有良好的跨模型和跨数据集可迁移性。对抗训练虽可部分降低攻击成功率，但仍存在显著残余漏洞。
AI.conclusion: 深度掌纹识别系统对物理实现的对抗性攻击存在显著且难以完全消除的脆弱性，即使采用对抗训练也只能部分降低攻击成功率。这表明在实际应用中需要更有效的防御手段来保护掌纹识别系统的安全性。

title: RePL: Pseudo-label Refinement for Semi-supervised LiDAR Semantic Segmentation
summary: Semi-supervised learning for LiDAR semantic segmentation often suffers from error propagation and confirmation bias caused by noisy pseudo-labels. To tackle this chronic issue, we introduce RePL, a novel framework that enhances pseudo-label quality by identifying and correcting potential errors in pseudo-labels through masked reconstruction, along with a dedicated training strategy. We also provide a theoretical analysis demonstrating the condition under which the pseudo-label refinement is beneficial, and empirically confirm that the condition is mild and clearly met by RePL. Extensive evaluations on the nuScenes-lidarseg and SemanticKITTI datasets show that RePL improves pseudo-label quality a lot and, as a result, achieves the state of the art in LiDAR semantic segmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出了RePL框架，通过masked reconstruction来识别和纠正半监督LiDAR语义分割中 noisy pseudo-labels 的错误，解决错误传播和确认偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 半监督学习用于LiDAR语义分割时，依赖于伪标签进行训练，但伪标签中的噪声会导致错误传播和确认偏差问题，严重影响模型性能。
AI.method: 提出RePL框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 通过masked reconstruction增强伪标签质量，识别和纠正伪标签中的潜在错误；2) 专门设计的训练策略。同时提供理论分析证明伪标签精炼有益的条件。
AI.result: 在nuScenes-lidarseg和SemanticKITTI数据集上进行了广泛评估，RePL显著提升了伪标签质量，取得了LiDAR语义分割的state-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: RePL通过masked reconstruction有效解决了半监督学习中伪标签噪声带来的错误传播和确认偏差问题，理论分析和实验结果均验证了该方法的有效性和实用性。

The application domain is entirely different - it's about semi-supervised learning for point cloud segmentation, not video-to-motion generation, pose estimation, or skeleton extraction. While "pseudo-label refinement" conceptually relates to handling noise, this is in the completely different domain of autonomous driving perception.

title: Generative Phomosaic with Structure-Aligned and Personalized Diffusion
summary: We present the first generative approach to photomosaic creation. Traditional photomosaic methods rely on a large number of tile images and color-based matching, which limits both diversity and structural consistency. Our generative photomosaic framework synthesizes tile images using diffusion-based generation conditioned on reference images. A low-frequency conditioned diffusion mechanism aligns global structure while preserving prompt-driven details. This generative formulation enables photomosaic composition that is both semantically expressive and structurally coherent, effectively overcoming the fundamental limitations of matching-based approaches. By leveraging few-shot personalized diffusion, our model is able to produce user-specific or stylistically consistent tiles without requiring an extensive collection of images.

AI.tldr: 首个生成式 photomosaic（照片马赛克）创建方法，使用扩散模型条件生成瓦片图像，通过低频条件扩散机制对齐全局结构，同时保留提示驱动的细节。
AI.motivation: 传统 photomosaic 方法依赖于大量瓦片图像和基于颜色的匹配，限制了多样性和结构一致性。
AI.method: 提出生成式 photomosaic 框架，使用基于扩散的生成来合成瓦片图像，条件于参考图像。采用低频条件扩散机制对齐全局结构，同时保留提示驱动的细节。利用少样本个性化扩散模型。
AI.result: 实现了语义表达力和结构一致性兼备的 photomosaic 组合，有效克服了基于匹配方法的根本局限。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需大量图像集合即可生成用户特定或风格一致的瓦片，为 photomosaic 创建开辟了新的生成式路径。

relevance_reason: 完全不同的应用领域。该论文是关于使用扩散模型生成照片马赛克（图像生成），而研究档案是关于文本到运动生成、视频到三维运动提取、姿态估计和骨架提取。即使都使用扩散模型，应用领域也不同：图像生成 vs 人体运动生成。这是计算机图形学中完全不同的子领域。

title: VGGT-SLAM++
comment: 8 pages (main paper) + supplementary material. Accepted at CVPR 2026 Workshop (VOCVALC)
summary: We introduce VGGT-SLAM++, a complete visual SLAM system that leverages the geometry-rich outputs of the Visual Geometry Grounded Transformer (VGGT). The system comprises a visual odometry (front-end) fusing the VGGT feed-forward transformer and a Sim(3) solution, a Digital Elevation Map (DEM)-based graph construction module, and a back-end that jointly enable accurate large-scale mapping with bounded memory. While prior transformer-based SLAM pipelines such as VGGT-SLAM rely primarily on sparse loop closures or global Sim(3) manifold constraints - allowing short-horizon pose drift - VGGT-SLAM++ restores high-cadence local bundle adjustment (LBA) through a spatially corrective back-end. For each VGGT submap, we construct a dense planar-canonical DEM, partition it into patches, and compute their DINOv2 embeddings to integrate the submap into a covisibility graph. Spatial neighbors are retrieved using a Visual Place Recognition (VPR) module within the covisibility window, triggering frequent local optimization that stabilizes trajectories. Across standard SLAM benchmarks, VGGT-SLAM++ achieves state-of-the-art accuracy, substantially reducing short-term drift, accelerating graph convergence, and maintaining global consistency with compact DEM tiles and sublinear retrieval.

AI.tldr: VGGT-SLAM++是一个利用视觉几何 grounding Transformer (VGGT)几何输出的完整视觉SLAM系统，通过融合VGGT前馈Transformer与Sim(3)解算的视觉里程计、基于数字高程图(DEM)的图构建模块以及空间校正后端，实现高精度的bounded-memory大规模建图。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的SLAM管道(如VGGT-SLAM)主要依赖稀疏闭环检测或全局Sim(3)流形约束，存在短期位姿漂移问题，缺乏高频率的局部束束调整(LBA)能力。
AI.method: 该系统包含三个核心模块：1)视觉里程计前端，融合VGGT前馈Transformer与Sim(3)解算方案；2)基于数字高程图(DEM)的图构建模块，将每个VGGT子图构建为稠密平面-规范DEM，分割成Patch并计算DINOv2嵌入以集成到共可见性图；3)空间校正后端，通过视觉地点识别(VPR)模块在共可见性窗口内检索空间邻域，触发频繁的局部优化。
AI.result: 在标准SLAM基准数据集上实现最先进的精度，显著降低了短期漂移，加速了图优化收敛，并通过紧凑的DEM瓦贴和子线性检索维持全局一致性。
AI.conclusion: VGGT-SLAM++成功实现了高精度的大规模视觉SLAM建图，通过DEM稠密地图分块和DINOv2嵌入特征实现子线性检索，在标准SLAM基准数据集上达到最先进的精度，显著降低了短期漂移，加速了图优化收敛，并保持了全局一致性。

relevance_reason: 完全不同的应用领域。该论文是关于机器人视觉SLAM系统（定位与建图），用于机器人导航；而研究profile是关于计算机图形学/文本到运动生成，用于人体运动合成。虽然两者都涉及3D几何理解，但应用场景完全不同：一个是机器人导航，一个是人体运动生成。论文中的VGGT Transformer用于SLAM几何估计，而非运动生成或姿态估计。

title: SurFITR: A Dataset for Surveillance Image Forgery Detection and Localisation
summary: We present the Surveillance Forgery Image Test Range (SurFITR), a dataset for surveillance-style image forgery detection and localisation, in response to recent advances in open-access image generation models that raise concerns about falsifying visual evidence. Existing forgery models, trained on datasets with full-image synthesis or large manipulated regions in object-centric images, struggle to generalise to surveillance scenarios. This is because tampering in surveillance imagery is typically localised and subtle, occurring in scenes with varied viewpoints, small or occluded subjects, and lower visual quality. To address this gap, SurFITR provides a large collection of forensically valuable imagery generated via a multimodal LLM-powered pipeline, enabling semantically aware, fine-grained editing across diverse surveillance scenes. It contains over 137k tampered images with varying resolutions and edit types, generated using multiple image editing models. Extensive experiments show that existing detectors degrade significantly on SurFITR, while training on SurFITR yields substantial improvements in both in-domain and cross-domain performance. SurFITR is publicly available on GitHub.

AI.tldr: SurFITR是一个用于监控风格图像伪造检测和定位的大规模数据集，包含超过137k个通过多模态LLM管道生成的伪造图像，可显著提升检测器在监控场景中的性能。
AI.motivation: 近年来开源图像生成模型的进步引发了视觉证据伪造的担忧。现有伪造检测模型在目标中心图像上训练，难以泛化到监控场景，因为监控图像中的篡改通常是局部且微妙的，场景具有多变的视角、小型或遮挡的物体以及较低的视觉质量。
AI.method: 提出SurFITR数据集，通过多模态LLM驱动的管道生成监控风格图像，实现语义感知的细粒度编辑。包含超过137k个伪造图像，具有不同分辨率和编辑类型，使用多种图像编辑模型生成。
AI.result: 现有检测器在SurFITR上性能显著下降，而在SurFITR上训练可显著提升领域内和跨领域性能。
AI.conclusion: SurFITR为监控风格图像伪造检测和定位提供了大规模基准数据集，可有效提升检测模型的泛化能力。

The paper deals with detecting fake images in surveillance scenarios, not generating or extracting 3D human motion from videos. The methods (image editing models for forgery) are unrelated to the research profile's methods (video generation models, pose estimation, skeleton extraction for motion generation).

title: Assessing the Added Value of Onboard Earth Observation Processing with the IRIDE HEO Service Segment
summary: Current operational Earth Observation (EO) services, including the Copernicus Emergency Management Service (CEMS), the European Forest Fire Information System (EFFIS), and the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS), rely primarily on ground-based processing pipelines. While these systems provide mature large-scale information products, they remain constrained by downlink latency, bandwidth limitations, and limited capability for autonomous observation prioritisation. The International Report for an Innovative Defence of Earth (IRIDE) programme is a national Earth observation initiative led by the Italian government to support public authorities through timely, objective information derived from spaceborne data. Rather than a single constellation, IRIDE is designed as a constellation of constellations, integrating heterogeneous sensing technologies within a unified service-oriented architecture. Within this framework, Hawk for Earth Observation (HEO) enables onboard generation of data products, allowing information extraction earlier in the processing chain. This paper examines the limitations of ground-only architectures and evaluates the added value of onboard processing at the operational service level. The IRIDE burnt-area mapping service is used as a representative case study to demonstrate how onboard intelligence can support higher spatial detail (sub-three-metre ground sampling distance), smaller detectable events (minimum mapping unit of three hectares), and improved system responsiveness. Rather than replacing existing Copernicus services, the IRIDE HEO capability is positioned as a complementary layer providing image-driven pre-classification to support downstream emergency and land-management workflows. This work highlights the operational value of onboard intelligence for emerging low-latency EO service architectures.

AI.tldr: IRIDE项目通过机载处理能力为地球观测服务提供低延迟解决方案，以燃烧区域制图为例展示其优势。
AI.motivation: 当前运营的地球观测服务（CEMS、EFFIS、CLMS）依赖地面处理流水线，受限于下行链路延迟、带宽限制和自主观测优先级能力不足。
AI.method: IRIDE项目设计为"星座的星座"，集成异构传感技术于统一服务架构。HEO支持在轨数据产品生成，实现处理链中更早的信息提取。以IRIDE燃烧区域制图服务为案例研究。
AI.result: 实现了更高空间细节（亚3米地面采样距离）、更小可探测事件（最小制图单元3公顷）和改进的系统响应能力。
AI.conclusion: IRIDE HEO能力作为Copernicus服务的补充层，提供图像驱动预分类以支持下游应急和土地管理工作流。凸显了机载智能在新兴低延迟EO服务架构中的运营价值。

title: RefineAnything: Multimodal Region-Specific Refinement for Perfect Local Details
summary: We introduce region-specific image refinement as a dedicated problem setting: given an input image and a user-specified region (e.g., a scribble mask or a bounding box), the goal is to restore fine-grained details while keeping all non-edited pixels strictly unchanged. Despite rapid progress in image generation, modern models still frequently suffer from local detail collapse (e.g., distorted text, logos, and thin structures). Existing instruction-driven editing models emphasize coarse-grained semantic edits and often either overlook subtle local defects or inadvertently change the background, especially when the region of interest occupies only a small portion of a fixed-resolution input. We present RefineAnything, a multimodal diffusion-based refinement model that supports both reference-based and reference-free refinement. Building on a counter-intuitive observation that crop-and-resize can substantially improve local reconstruction under a fixed VAE input resolution, we propose Focus-and-Refine, a region-focused refinement-and-paste-back strategy that improves refinement effectiveness and efficiency by reallocating the resolution budget to the target region, while a blended-mask paste-back guarantees strict background preservation. We further introduce a boundary-aware Boundary Consistency Loss to reduce seam artifacts and improve paste-back naturalness. To support this new setting, we construct Refine-30K (20K reference-based and 10K reference-free samples) and introduce RefineEval, a benchmark that evaluates both edited-region fidelity and background consistency. On RefineEval, RefineAnything achieves strong improvements over competitive baselines and near-perfect background preservation, establishing a practical solution for high-precision local refinement. Project Page: https://limuloo.github.io/RefineAnything/.

AI.tldr: RefineAnything是一个多模态扩散精化模型，用于区域特定的图像细节恢复。通过Focus-and-Refine策略将分辨率预算重新分配到目标区域，并使用Boundary Consistency Loss减少拼接痕迹，在Refine-30K数据集和RefineEval基准上实现了高效的局部精化和近乎完美的背景保持。
AI.motivation: 现代图像生成模型在局部细节恢复上存在缺陷（如文字、标志、细结构扭曲），且现有编辑模型容易忽视局部缺陷或意外改变背景。当目标区域只占输入分辨率的小部分时问题更严重。需要一个专门针对区域特定图像精化的解决方案。
AI.method:
1. 提出Focus-and-Refine策略：将输入图像裁剪并调整大小到目标区域，提高局部重建质量，然后将结果混合粘贴回原图
2. 设计Boundary Consistency Loss：减少拼接伪影，提高自然度
3. 构建Refine-30K数据集（20K参考基+10K无参考）和RefineEval基准
AI.result: 在RefineEval基准上相比竞争基线有显著提升，实现了近乎完美的背景保持和高精度的局部精化效果。
AI.conclusion: RefineAnything为高 precision局部精化提供了实用解决方案，通过区域聚焦策略有效解决了固定VAE分辨率下的小目标区域精化问题。

Even though both use diffusion models, this paper focuses on enhancing local image details (text, logos, fine structures), while the research profile requires video-to-3D motion generation methods. The application domains are fundamentally different: image editing vs. human motion generation. This is a classic example of "using similar methods but wrong application domain."

title: Energy-based Tissue Manifolds for Longitudinal Multiparametric MRI Analysis
comment: The code is available at https://github.com/tkartikay/EnFold-MRI
summary: We propose a geometric framework for longitudinal multi-parametric MRI analysis based on patient-specific energy modelling in sequence space. Rather than operating on images with spatial networks, each voxel is represented by its multi-sequence intensity vector ($T1$, $T1c$, $T2$, FLAIR, ADC), and a compact implicit neural representation is trained via denoising score matching to learn an energy function $E_θ(\mathbf{u})$ over $\mathbb{R}^d$ from a single baseline scan. The learned energy landscape provides a differential-geometric description of tissue regimes without segmentation labels. Local minima define tissue basins, gradient magnitude reflects proximity to regime boundaries, and Laplacian curvature characterises local constraint structure. Importantly, this baseline energy manifold is treated as a fixed geometric reference: it encodes the set of contrast combinations observed at diagnosis and is not retrained at follow-up. Longitudinal assessment is therefore formulated as evaluation of subsequent scans relative to this baseline geometry. Rather than comparing anatomical segmentations, we analyse how the distribution of MRI sequence vectors evolves under the baseline energy function. In a paediatric case with later recurrence, follow-up scans show progressive deviation in energy and directional displacement in sequence space toward the baseline tumour-associated regime before clear radiological reappearance. In a case with stable disease, voxel distributions remain confined to established low-energy basins without systematic drift. The presented cases serve as proof-of-concept that patient-specific energy manifolds can function as geometric reference systems for longitudinal mpMRI analysis without explicit segmentation or supervised classification, providing a foundation for further investigation of manifold-based tissue-at-risk tracking in neuro-oncology.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于患者特定能量建模的几何框架，用于纵向多参数MRI分析，无需分割标签或监督分类即可追踪组织变化。
AI.motivation: 现有纵向MRI分析方法依赖解剖分割或监督分类，缺乏患者特异性的几何参考系统来追踪组织状态演变。
AI.method: 将每个体素表示为多序列强度向量（T1, T1c, T2, FLAIR, ADC），使用去噪分数匹配训练隐式神经表示学习能量函数E_θ(u)；将基线能量流形作为固定几何参考，通过分析后续扫描向量分布相对于基线能量的变化进行纵向评估。
AI.result: 复发儿童病例在影像学明确复发前显示能量进行性增加和向肿瘤相关区域的定向位移；稳定疾病病例体素分布保持在低能量basin内无系统性漂移。
AI.conclusion: 患者特异性能量流形可作为纵向多参数MRI分析的几何参考系统，为神经肿瘤学中组织风险追踪提供基础。

title: TeaLeafVision: An Explainable and Robust Deep Learning Framework for Tea Leaf Disease Classification
summary: As the worlds second most consumed beverage after water, tea is not just a cultural staple but a global economic force of profound scale and influence. More than a mere drink, it represents a quiet negotiation between nature, culture, and the human desire for a moment of reflection. So, the precise identification and detection of tea leaf disease is crucial. With this goal, we have evaluated several Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) models, among them three shows noticeable performance including DenseNet201, MobileNetV2, InceptionV3 on the teaLeafBD dataset. teaLeafBD dataset contains seven classes, six disease classes and one healthy class, collected under various field conditions reflecting real world challenges. Among the CNN models, DenseNet201 has achieved the highest test accuracy of 99%. In order to enhance the model reliability and interpretability, we have implemented Gradient weighted Class Activation Mapping (Grad CAM), occlusion sensitivity analysis and adversarial training techniques to increase the noise resistance of the model. Finally, we have developed a prototype in order to leverage the models capabilities on real life agriculture. This paper illustrates the deep learning models capabilities to classify the disease in real life tea leaf disease detection and management.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用深度学习技术开发茶叶病害自动检测系统，DenseNet201模型达到99%准确率，并结合可解释性方法实现了实际应用。
AI.motivation: 茶叶作为全球第二大消费饮品，其病害的精确识别和检测对农业生产具有重要意义，需要开发高效的自动化检测方法来保障茶叶产量和品质。
AI.method: 研究评估了多个CNN模型（ DenseNet201、MobileNetV2、InceptionV3），并采用Grad CAM、遮挡敏感性分析和对抗训练技术增强模型的可靠性和可解释性。
AI.result: DenseNet201在teaLeafBD数据集（包含7个类别：6个病害类+1个健康类）上取得了99%的最高测试准确率，成功开发了可在实际农业中应用的原型系统。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功开发了基于深度学习的茶叶病害检测系统，DenseNet201模型达到99%的测试准确率，并通过Grad CAM、遮挡敏感性分析和对抗训练技术提高了模型的可解释性和鲁棒性，最终实现了可在实际农业中应用的原型系统。
